title: opt_dff: skip convertion to dffe for keep wires

features.name: keep attribute on wire feeding mux-driven flip-flop
features.description: Code should include a wire marked with (* keep *) attribute that serves as output of a MUX, where the MUX feeds a register (flip-flop) and the MUX select signal is derived from the register output

features.name: dffe conversion when mux select becomes register enable
features.description: Code should include a flip-flop driven by a MUX where the MUX select signal becomes the enable signal in an enable flop (dffe) conversion
